summary: Ukrainian forces destroyed a Polish 155-mm self-propelled howitzer "AHS Krab" in the Kharkiv region using an optical fiber-guided FPV drone "Provod." Russian forces repelled assaults on two fronts and destroyed enemy tanks, with the advances taking place in the responsibility zones of the NSU Corps "Azov" and the 9th Army Corps. A Russian soldier hiding behind a tree was hit by two Ukrainian FPV drones simultaneously. Ukrainian experts will depart for the Middle East to train Gulf countries in countering drones, with several Middle Eastern countries expressing interest in Ukrainian assistance.
